title: Ending's Festivities
body:
Ending's Festivities  
     This is a texture pack adaptation of my mod, Ending's Festivities, and gets your Minecraft world ready for Christmas!  
Includes:  
     Retextured Netherite blocks, ingots, ancient debris, Netherite scraps, and all Netherite tools to their candy cane equivalents with a red and white colour scheme.  
     Retextured Netherite armour to look like a Santa outfit, with Santa boots, leggings, chestplate, and helmet/hat.  
     If you like the texture pack then please leave a kind comment, or suggest more that I should add, Enjoy!
